task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "安装mediainfo工具以获取音频元数据"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "运行mediainfo命令提取音频比特率、采样率等基础信息"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "安装sox工具以生成音频频谱图"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "运行sox命令生成音频频谱图并保存为PNG文件"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "安装Audacity图形化工具以加载音频文件"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "在Audacity中查看音频波形和频谱视图"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "安装Python依赖库（如pydub和matplotlib）"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "运行Python脚本读取音频文件并绘制波形图"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "运行Python脚本生成音频频谱图"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "运行find命令列出目录下所有mp3文件及其关键参数"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "根据比特率、时长和声道数筛选最佳候选文件"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "编写并运行Bash脚本预处理选定的mp3文件"}, {"id": "Node13", "description": "设置音频为立体声、44.1kHz采样率及恒定比特率"}, {"id": "Node14", "description": "添加自定义元数据标记到音频文件"}, {"id": "Node15", "description": "运行ffmpeg命令剪切音频片段"}, {"id": "Node16", "description": "运行ffmpeg命令标准化音频音量至广播级标准"}, {"id": "Node17", "description": "运行Python脚本检测并消除音频中的空白噪音"}, {"id": "Node18", "description": "运行AI算法评估并推荐最佳mp3文件"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "extractMetadata"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "generateSpectrogram"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "visualizeWaveformAndSpectrum"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "plotWaveform"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node9", "type": "plotSpectrogram"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "filterBestCandidate"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node12", "type": "preprocessAudio"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node13", "type": "standardizeParameters"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node14", "type": "addMetadata"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node15", "type": "cutAudioSegment"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node16", "type": "normalizeVolume"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node17", "type": "removeSilence"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node18", "type": "runAISelection"}]}
